source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/12_Biocompatibility/A-TCF-5-144 Biocompatibility Assessment Report.pdf

document.title: Biocompatibility Assessment Report for Digital X-ray Imaging System Model name: HnX-R1

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturer technical documentation assessing biocompatibility for the HnX-R1 digital X-ray imaging system and its detector skin-contact deco sheet.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to select biological evaluation tests for HnX-R1 according to FDA biocompatibility guidance and ISO 10993, and to document biological safety test results.
keyPoints: HnX-R1 is a wired/wireless digital X-ray imaging system with G series and 2/3G series detectors and HnVUE console software.
The skin-contact part is the detector deco sheet, with direct skin contact stated to be only the OMAY polycarbonate film.
The device is categorized as skin surface contact with limited exposure of 24 hours or less.
Selected biological evaluation tests are cytotoxicity, sensitization, and irritation or intracutaneous reactivity.
Korea Testing Laboratory test results for cytotoxicity, irritation or intracutaneous reactivity, and sensitization are listed as Satisfied.

concepts.evidence: The purpose of this assessment is to ensure that no undue risks arise from biological hazards associated with materials of manufacture and final devices.

concepts.evidence: b) Duration of contact: Limited exposure (≤ 24 Hours)

evidence.claim: The document is A-TCF-5-144, Rev. No. 1, titled Biocompatibility Assessment Report, with Rev. Date Sep/01/2025.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical Documentation Document No. A-TCF-5-144 Rev. No. 1 Biocompatibility Assessment Report Rev. Date Sep/01/2025

evidence.claim: The report applies to the Digital X-ray Imaging System model HnX-R1.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: Digital X-ray Imaging System Model name: HnX-R1

evidence.claim: The HnX-R1 system includes detectors, power supply box, battery pack, battery charger, accessories, and software for image acquisition and processing, and excludes the X-ray generator.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-R1 wired/wireless digital X-ray imaging system consists of Detector, Power supply box, Battery pack, Battery charger, Other Accessories and software for image acquisition and image processing and does not include the X-ray generator.

evidence.claim: The detector model references include eight G series models and three 2/3G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: there are 8 types of G series (G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP) and 3 types of 2/3G series (A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW).

evidence.claim: HnVUE is the console software for image acquisition and image processing.
evidence.evidenceText: The name of the image acquisition and image processing software (Console software) is HnVUE.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The intended use is to replace film-based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnoses for physicians and radiologists.
evidence.evidenceText: d) Indication for User: It is intended to replace film-based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnoses for physicians and radiologists.

evidence.claim: The detector deco sheet contacts the skin surface.
evidence.evidenceText: The Deco sheet on the front of the detector contacts the skin surface.
evidence.pageTarget: Skin Contact Materials In Medical Devices

evidence.claim: Only the OMAY polycarbonate film is stated to directly contact skin.
evidence.evidenceText: the part that comes into direct contact with the skin is only the OMAY polycarbonate film.

evidence.claim: The deco sheet for the G series and 2/3G series are made of the same material.
evidence.evidenceText: The deco sheets for the G series and 2/3G series are made of the same material.

evidence.claim: The device is categorized as skin surface contact with limited exposure of 24 hours or less.
evidence.evidenceText: a) Nature of body contact: Skin surface b) Duration of contact: Limited exposure (≤ 24 Hours)

evidence.claim: Biological evaluation test selection is stated to follow FDA biocompatibility guidance using ISO 10993.
evidence.evidenceText: Selection of biological evaluation test according to FDA biocompatibility guideline (Use of International Standard ISO-10993, ‘Biological Evaluation of Medical Devices - Part 1: Evaluation and Testing)

evidence.claim: Selected tests are cytotoxicity, sensitization, and irritation or intracutaneous reactivity.
evidence.evidenceText: Cytotoxicity O Sensitization (Delayed-type hypersensitivity) O Irritation or intracutaneous reactivity O

evidence.claim: Applied standards listed are ISO 10993-1, ISO 10993-5, ISO 10993-10, and ISO 10993-12.
evidence.evidenceText: 5. Applied Standards - ISO 10993-1: Selection of Tests - ISO 10993-5: Test for Cytotoxicity - ISO 10993-10: Test for Irritation and Sensitization - ISO 10993-12: Sample Preparation

evidence.claim: Cytotoxicity testing to ISO 10993-5:2009 by Korea Testing Laboratory report 20-0094 was satisfied.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 Cytotoxicity ISO 10993-5:2009 Korea Testing Laboratory (KTL) 20-0094 Satisfied

evidence.claim: Irritation or intracutaneous reactivity testing to ISO 10993-10:2010 by Korea Testing Laboratory report 20-0095 was satisfied.
evidence.evidenceText: 2 Irritation or Intracutaneous Reactivity ISO 10993-10:2010 Korea Testing Laboratory (KTL) 20-0095 Satisfied
evidence.pageTarget: ISO 10993 Irritation And Intracutaneous Reactivity Testing

evidence.claim: Sensitization testing to ISO 10993-10:2010 by Korea Testing Laboratory report 20-0096 was satisfied.
evidence.evidenceText: 3 Sensitization ISO 10993-10:2010 Korea Testing Laboratory (KTL) 20-0096 Satisfied

evidence.claim: The final assessment concludes HnX-R1 is suitable to use as a medical device and biological safety based on the listed results.
evidence.evidenceText: In conclusion, HnX-R1 is suitable to use as medical device and biological safety based on the above results.

evidence.claim: Revision 1 was dated Sep/01/2025 and modified the model name and added detectors using the same material for the skin contact area.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 Sep/01/2025 Modified model name and added detectors that use the same material for the skin contact area.

reviewFlags.reason: Conflicting revision metadata appears in the source: most pages identify Rev. No. 1 and Rev. Date Sep/01/2025, but page 6 header shows Rev. No. 0 and Rev. Date Nov/10/2022.
Authority signal is FDA, but the source is manufacturer technical documentation that references an FDA biocompatibility guideline; it is not presented as an FDA-issued document.
The FDA guideline is referenced by description only; no FDA guidance document title, issue date, or version is provided.
Some tabular OCR text on the device categorization page is degraded, including split or misspelled endpoint labels such as 'Irrtation' and 'Degradaton'.
